name: G-4 migrate-rubric: a real run archives rubric/RUBRIC.yaml to rubric/RUBRIC.legacy.yaml.archived
command:
mkdir -p root/rubric && printf 'rules:
  - id: g-google-001
    provenance:
      - source: google-tsguide
' > root/rubric/RUBRIC.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/scripts/migrate-rubric-to-source-folders.sh" --root "$PWD/root" --emit-tree "$PWD/out" 2>err.txt; rc=$?; [ "$rc" -eq 0 ] && [ -f root/rubric/RUBRIC.legacy.yaml.archived ] && [ ! -f root/rubric/RUBRIC.yaml ] && echo archived 1>&2
